CustomField.description: Select the billing currency applicable for Rent and Fee invoices. This value defaults to the Transaction Currency on the Rent Schedule but can be updated there if needed. All other invoice types will continue to be issued in USD.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the billing currency applicable for Rent and Fee invoices. This value defaults to the Transaction Currency on the Rent Schedule but can be updated there if needed. All other invoice types will continue to be issued in USD.
CustomField.label: Billing Currency
